name: Startup Runway Calculator
description: Show months of runway before funds run out.

example.explanation: Runway estimates how many months your startup can operate at current burn.

faqs.question: What is burn rate?
faqs.answer: It is the amount of cash spent each month to run the business.

faqs.question: How can I extend runway?
faqs.answer: Reduce burn or increase funding / revenue.

faqs.question: Why is runway important?
faqs.answer: It tells you how much time you have to reach profitability or secure funding.
